site.name: Cherry Street Commons
site.description: Affordable homes at Cherry Street Commons.

announcement.text: Accepting applications June 22, 2026 thru July 7, 2026 * lottery application on July 8, 2026 *

slides.title: Cherry Street Commons
slides.body: Modern, welcoming homes designed for comfort, access, and community.

slides.title: A practical place to call home
slides.body: Thoughtful layouts, shared green space, and a location built around daily needs.

slides.title: Comfort with community nearby
slides.body: Explore affordable housing created for stability, belonging, and long-term value.

intro.title: Affordable homes planned around real life.
intro.body: Cherry Street Commons brings together comfortable residences, useful community spaces, and a simple path for applicants who want a clear next step.

cards.title: Affordable Living
cards.body: Homes designed to support household budgets without sacrificing comfort.

cards.title: Community Spaces
cards.body: Outdoor and shared areas give residents room to connect and recharge.

cards.title: Efficient Design
cards.body: Durable finishes and efficient systems support responsible long-term living.

cards.title: Easy Application
cards.body: A direct application path helps residents understand eligibility and next steps.

location.title: Find Cherry Street Commons
location.body: Use the interactive map to locate the property and plan your route.

/about.title: About Cherry Street Commons
/about.body: Cherry Street Commons is planned around practical, welcoming homes for residents who want stability, comfort, and connection. The property brings together thoughtful layouts, accessible paths, and shared spaces that support daily life.

aboutSection.title: Affordable homes designed around daily life.
aboutSection.subtitle: Comfort, access, and community in San Carlos.
aboutSection.body: Use this space to describe Cherry Street Commons, the property mission, resident experience, and what makes the community distinct.

cards.title: Resident first
cards.body: Homes and common areas are arranged for clear navigation, comfort, and everyday convenience.

cards.title: Built for access
cards.body: The site emphasizes walkability, transit-friendly living, and approachable application guidance.

cards.title: Long-term value
cards.body: Durable materials and efficient systems help keep the community reliable over time.

/sustainability.title: Property Details
/sustainability.body: Explore the property details and in-home features planned for Cherry Street Commons.

details.title: Property Details
details.subtitle: Designed with practical features for comfortable affordable living.
details.featuresText:
Air Conditioning
Appliances
Blinds
Broadband Internet Access
Cable Ready
Carpet and Vinyl Flooring
Electric cooktop stove and range
Energy Star rated appliances
High efficiency light fixtures and appliances
Refrigerator and Range
Sewer
Smoke Free Community
Trash and recycle chutes
Water
Window Coverings

cards.title: Energy smart
cards.body: Efficient fixtures and systems are intended to reduce waste and support resident affordability.

cards.title: Healthy grounds
cards.body: Landscaping is planned to provide shade, soften the site, and create a calmer street presence.

cards.title: Lower impact
cards.body: Shared amenities and compact layouts help make daily living more efficient.

/community.title: Amenities
/community.body: Amenities that support convenience, connection, security, and everyday resident life.

amenities.title: Amenities
amenities.subtitle: Resident-focused features for daily life.
amenities.itemsText:
After-school program
Bicycle Storage
Electric Vehicle Charging Stations
Gated Parking
Key Fob Security
Laundry Room
Playground

cards.title: Gathering areas
cards.body: Shared spaces encourage neighborly connection without overwhelming private residential life.

cards.title: Neighborhood scale
cards.body: The property is designed to feel grounded in the surrounding community.

cards.title: Everyday support
cards.body: Clear contact paths help applicants and residents get information when they need it.

/floor-plans.title: Floor Plans
/floor-plans.eyebrow: Simple layouts for real daily needs
/floor-plans.body: Floor plan details can be presented by bedroom count, availability, and household needs. Applicants can contact the property team for current availability and eligibility requirements.

cards.title: One bedroom
cards.body: Efficient private homes for individuals or smaller households.

cards.title: Two bedroom
cards.body: Balanced layouts with more room for daily routines.

cards.title: Accessible options
cards.body: Select homes may support accessibility needs. Contact the property team for details.

floorPlans.title: One Bedroom Plan
floorPlans.label: 1 BR
floorPlans.body: Floor plan image and apartment details can be added here.

floorPlans.title: Two Bedroom Plan

floorPlans.title: Accessible Plan

floorPlans.body: Accessible layout image and availability notes can be added here.

/eligibility.title: Eligibility
/eligibility.body: Use this page to explain what applicants need in order to qualify for an apartment at Cherry Street Commons.

eligibility.introSubtitle: Learn about our affordable housing requirements.
eligibility.incomeSubtitle: Based on current HUD AMI limits.
eligibility.incomeTable:
AMI|1 Person|2 Person|3 Person
30%|Add amount|Add amount|N/A
50%|Add amount|Add amount|N/A
80%|Add amount|Add amount|Add amount
eligibility.rentTable:
No. Of Units|Square Footage|Unit Type|AMI Level|Monthly Rent
Add units|Add sq ft|Studio|30%|Add rent
Add units|Add sq ft|1 Bedroom|80%|Add rent
eligibility.occupancyTable:
Bed Size|Minimum|Maximum
Studio Unit|1 Person|2 Persons
1-Bedroom Unit|1 Person|3 Persons
eligibility.limitsBody: Income limits and rents are subject to change based on current published program limits prior to move-in.
eligibility.availabilityTable:
Unit Type|AMI Level|Total Units|Currently Available
Studio|30% AMI|Add total|Add available
1 Bedroom|80% AMI|Add total|Add available
eligibility.applyBody: To apply for housing at Cherry Street Commons, please contact the leasing office. Staff can discuss eligibility and answer questions about the affordable housing program.

requirements.title: Documentation Required
requirements.body: Proof of income, identification, and employment verification.

requirements.title: Background Check
requirements.body: All applicants must pass the standard background screening.

requirements.title: Credit Review
requirements.body: Credit history may be reviewed as part of the application process.

requirements.title: Income Verification
requirements.body: Annual income must fall within the applicable AMI requirements.

eligibility.readySubtitle: Complete your application or contact the leasing office for assistance.

readyCards.title: Apply Online
readyCards.body: Fill out the online form and submit your application.

readyCards.title: Book a Visit
readyCards.body: Schedule a visit or ask questions about the property.

readyCards.title: Questions?
readyCards.body: Contact the leasing office for assistance.

cards.title: Income guidelines
cards.body: Add income limits, household size requirements, and any program-specific qualification notes here.

cards.title: Required documents
cards.body: List the documents applicants should prepare before applying.

cards.title: Application review
cards.body: Explain the review process, timing, and next steps for applicants.

/neiborhub.title: Neighborhood
/neiborhub.body: Use this page to highlight what is near the building, including transportation, schools, parks, shopping, services, and neighborhood destinations.

neighborhood.title: Explore the Neighborhood
neighborhood.subtitle: Everything residents need nearby.
neighborhood.body: Use this section to describe transportation, shopping, schools, parks, services, and destinations around Cherry Street Commons.

cards.body: Describe nearby public transportation, major roads, and walkable access points.

cards.title: Daily needs
cards.body: Add nearby grocery stores, pharmacies, medical offices, and everyday services.

cards.title: Parks and community
cards.body: Highlight parks, schools, libraries, recreation, and community resources nearby.

/contact.title: Contact
/contact.body: Use the application button or contact the property team to learn about availability, income guidelines, required documents, and next steps for Cherry Street Commons.

cards.title: Apply online
cards.body: Start the application process and receive next-step instructions.

cards.title: Ask about eligibility
cards.body: Confirm household, income, and document requirements before applying.

cards.title: Visit the property
cards.body: Use the map to locate Cherry Street Commons and plan your visit.
